name: Sweet Oatmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Red Star active dry yeast
-1 to 1-1/2 pounds of dough for the machine (use 3 teaspoons yeast if using a Panasonic/National machine, or use 2 teaspoons yeast if using a Welbilt/Dak machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select Light crust setting and press Start.
- Some machines may require Bread Color: Light or Crust: Adjust Temp. Sensor to Light settings.
3. Menu selection: Bake Light.
- Some machines may have Bread or White Bread options.
4. Note: This bread can be set on a delayed timer if desired.
5. Enjoy by cutting a thick slice and toasting it, resulting in a 1-1/2 pound loaf.
